metadata.description: The superlazy skill marketplace. One plugin. It does not want to talk about it.

plugins.name: superlazy
plugins.description: 13 token-minimal coding skills plus a no-reread hook: silent TDD, root-cause debugging, planning, review, verification with filtered output, worktrees, subagents, skill & MCP building, context indexing, codebase repo-mapping, and an all-in-one ultralazy loadout. Output ≤3 lines, full quality.
